node.html:
iOS Software engineer in projects for major telecommunication companies in Europe.

Key responsibilities:

  • iOS app development
  • Software architecture design for clients’ needs
  • Unit testing.

I served my military service as a software engineer in KEPYES (IT support centre of the Greek Army)

Key responsibilities:

  • Full-stack implementation and maintenance of internal web applications.
  • Analytical queries development
  • Unit Testing
  • Generating analytical reports for Greek Army officials

Key responsibilities:

  • Development and maintenance of the iOS app
  • iOS app related KPIs monitoring (active users,

ratings, reviews, etc)

Collaborated with many international clients mainly operating in the maritime industry and delivery services.

Key responsibilities:

  • Mobile app development (mainly iOS)
  • Back-end development
  • Front-end web development
  • Main technologies and Frameworks used: Javascript, Node.JS, React, Redux, Python, Django, Angular, Swift, MongoDB, SQL

A small business creating great mobile apps and games.

Published 9 apps and games in App Store between 2011 and 2016.
